items.title: Wyoming celebrates 'nuclear renaissance' as feds approve license for a new reactor
items.desc: Construction of an advanced nuclear power plant partly funded by the U.S. government -billed as the first of its kind this century, is now underway in Wyoming. The Bill Gates-backed company says its technology is proven but there are still hurdles to nuclear.
